title: BELREZ Electric Fly Zapper - Electronic Bug Zapper with Protective net Layer - Pest Control Mosquito and Insect Catcher Racket - Electric Fly Swatter - Handy Killer Racket for Indoor and Outdoor
bullet_points: 🗲🗲 PRODUCT DETAILS - Fly Swatter Zapper Racket operates with 2x AA Batteries (not included) and has dimensions of 44CM x 17CM.
🗲🗲 ELIMINATE BUGS & FLIES INSTANTLY - Featuring 3 layers of mesh protection, it ensures maximum safety even for children, yet shows no mercy to bugs. An incredibly effective tool for pest control!

🗲🗲 PORTABLE DEFENSE: Lightweight and compact, this zapper is an outdoor essential. Perfect for backyard gatherings, BBQs, camping, and hiking, it ensures you're always ready to tackle those pesky insects.

🗲🗲 COMFORTABLE HANDLING: Designed with an ergonomic and lightweight build, our racket offers a comfortable grip and precise control. Easily target and eliminate bugs with quick results and minimal mess.

🗲🗲 SIMPLE TO OPERATE: Just press and hold the button to use, and release to automatically turn off the power. User-friendly and safe for you and your family. Note: Keep out of reach of babies and small children!
description:
Product Description: The Bug Zapper offers a secure method to manage insects. It lures bugs and eradicates them instantly with an electric shock. Perfect for use at home, in caravans, or workshops.

BATTERY OPERATED - Requires 2 x AA batteries (not included).

How to Use:

Hold the zapper and press the yellow button to activate.
Keep the button pressed and swipe at bugs to zap them!
Note: You won't get shocked by zapping bugs on your skin; only pressing the nets together poses a risk of shock.

100% SAFE AND SIMPLE TO USE

FOR ADULT USE ONLY - NOT A TOY FOR CHILDREN!
